title: Shrimp Tangara
description: A tangy and crunchy Spanish dish featuring jumbo shrimp, served as a light lunch option.
instructions: Peel and devein the shrimp. Rinse them under cold water.
In a large bowl, mix together the lime juice, red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder to make the marinade.
Add the shrimp to the marinade and toss gently to coat evenly.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap or aluminum foil and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
In a skillet, heat enough olive oil to cover the base. Add the shrimp and cook until they turn pink and opaque about 2-3 minutes per side.
Sprinkle gluten-free tortilla chips on top of the cooked shrimp if desired. Serve hot with the tangy sauce.
